name: labs_assets_risk
query:
SELECT a.equipment_id as equipment_id, a.device_type as device_type, a.model, a.risk_score, model_count
    FROM labs_assets_risk a 
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT count(*) as model_count, device_type, model
        FROM labs_assets_risk 
        GROUP BY device_type, model
    ) AS model_aggregation
    ON a.model = model_aggregation.model and a.device_type = model_aggregation.device_type
